title: ilex × kiusiana
intro: Ilex × kiusiana is a hybrid plant species within the holly family (Aquifoliaceae), resulting from the cross between Ilex pedunculosa and Ilex × hachidoro. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain a high concentration of vitamins and antioxidants. Ilex × kiusiana is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to boost the immune system and protect against certain diseases. The plant's berries are often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
